title: Producer with acks=1 for critical business events — data loss on leader failure
code_snippet:
config := sarama.NewConfig()
config.Producer.RequiredAcks = sarama.WaitForLocal  // acks=1
config.Producer.Return.Successes = true
producer, _ := sarama.NewSyncProducer(brokers, config)
producer.SendMessage(&sarama.ProducerMessage{
    Topic: "order.events",
    Key:   sarama.StringEncoder(orderID),
    Value: sarama.ByteEncoder(eventData),
})
expected_feedback: Critical: Producer configured with acks=1 (WaitForLocal) — the leader acknowledges the write before any replica has received it. If the leader broker fails immediately after acknowledging, the event is permanently lost. For non-ephemeral business events, use acks=all (WaitForAll) combined with enable.idempotence=true to prevent both data loss and duplicate writes from retries. Also set min.insync.replicas=2 on the topic to ensure at least 2 replicas acknowledge.
